defaultEngineering.description: Substantial engineering, architecture, critical debugging, and important implementation work.

missionControlUpdate.description: Mission Control maintenance, low-complexity updates, progress pushes, routine UI iteration, and light refactors.

localGruntWork.description: Ultra-cheap local lane for triage, repetitive extraction, rough first-pass drafting, lightweight summarization, and helper-agent grunt work.
escalateWhen: architecture or debugging depth is required
high-risk or high-confidence decisions are needed
